title: ARGOMAX Leak Proof Denture Bath Cup, Portable Soaking Denture Box, Denture Bath Case with Strainer, for Dentures and Braces (Black + Orange).
features: 【Leak Proof Design】: The Leak Proof Denture Bath Cup is Closed by Hinges and Pressure Clips, Which Create Pressure At the Top and Bottom, And a High-Quality Silicone Waterproof Ring Is Used At the Joints of the Lid To Achieve the Ultimate in Leak-Proofness.
【Robust and Durable】: ARGOMAX Denture Bath Case is Made of High-Quality Plastic 3mm Shell and Metal Hinge Shaft, Rounded and Smooth Shape is More Comfortable to the Touch, Anti-Drop and Anti-Knock.

【Internal Capacity】: The Lnternal Capacity Space of About 8.5*7.5*5.5cm Meets the Vast Majority of Dentures and Braces Soaking. The Bottom Tank Can Hold Up to 220ml of Liquid, Enough to Ensure Soaking of Every Crevice of Dentures and Aligner.

【Widely Used】: This Denture Bath Box Has a Draining Basket for Extracting Cleaned Dentures and a Leak-Proof Design for Cleaning Dentures or Retainers Anytime, Anywhere. The "Denture Bath Box" Is Perfect for Cleaning Braces, Dentures, Aligner, Retainer, Mouth Guards, Baby Pacifiers or Storing Small Items.

【Worry-Free After-Sales】: ARGOMAX Pays Great Attention to Customer Experience, We Want to Get All Buyers' Satisfaction, Any Product-Related Problems, We Will Provide You With a Satisfactory Solution Within 24 Hours of the Customer Contacting Us.
